Impacted is an unknown function of the file python/sglang/srt/lora/lora_manager.py of the component Inference HTTP Endpoint. Such manipulation of the argument lora_path leads to reachable assertion. The attack can be launched remotely. A high complexity level is associated with this attack. The exploitability is considered difficult. The exploit has been disclosed publicly and may be used.
